Content outside job card that should NOT be selected

Manager, Software Engineering

Diligent Corporation

Position overview:

We're looking for a Software Engineering Manager who blends technical depth with product intuition.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and grow a cross-functional engineering team.
  • Collaborate closely with Product Managers and Designers.

About Us

Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions.
